name: Sweet Corn Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the whole kernel corn.
2. Place the corn in a 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Add the melted butter and stir to mix with the corn.
4. Add 2 half pints of whipping cream (unwhipped) to the corn and mix in.
5. Sprinkle the dry corn bread mix over the top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
7. Makes a full 9 x 13-inch pan of corn.
8. Serves 15.
